hooks.command:
node -e "const p=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_PATH||'';const triggers=['src/store/','src/types/domain.ts','src-tauri/src/lib.rs','src/components/Dashboard','src/hooks/useIsMobile'];const hit=triggers.some(t=>p.includes(t));if(hit)process.stderr.write('
[doc-maintain] Co-commit trigger detected: '+p+'
Run /doc-maintain before committing to keep docs in sync.
');"
